E

Edge - Class in model
Represents a directed or undirected connection between two nodes in the graph.
Edge(Node, Node, double, int, EdgeType, boolean) - Constructor for class model.Edge
Creates a new edge between two nodes.
Edge(Node, Node, double, EdgeType, boolean) - Constructor for class model.Edge
 
edgeClickHandler - Variable in class view.GraphView
Callback invoked when an edge is clicked
edgeCreationMode - Variable in class controller.GraphController
Indicates whether the controller is waiting for two nodes to create an edge

Creates an instance of a EdgeData record class.
EdgeType - Enum Class in model

edgeTypeRow(String, double, boolean) - Method in class ui.LegendPanel
Builds one row for an edge type legend item.
edgeViews - Variable in class view.GraphView
 
editBtn - Variable in class ui.ToolBox

Enables deletion mode.
enableEdgeCreationMode() - Method in class controller.GraphController
Enables edge creation mode.
enableNodeCreationMode() - Method in class controller.GraphController
Enables node creation mode.
engine - Variable in class controller.GraphController

Checks equality based on agent id.
